title: Grey Primer Metal Aerosol Spray Paint (250 ml) 1 Piece - Fast Drying, Perfect Base Coat Preparation
features: BASE COAT PREPARATION: Our grey primer spray paint offers the perfect foundation for your painting project. With 250ml of high-quality paint, it’s the ideal base before applying the final color coat, ensuring a smooth and even topcoat application.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Packaged in a durable metal aerosol can with a PP nozzle and lid, ensuring your primer remains effective till the last drop. No more struggling with low-quality cans that fail to deliver consistent results.

RAPID DRYING FORMULA: Our grey primer spray paint has a fast-drying formula, allowing you to move quickly from prep work to applying the final coat. This saves you valuable time and allows you to complete your project efficiently.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Designed for flexibility, our grey primer spray paint is perfect for both interior and exterior projects. Whether you're revamping furniture, refreshing walls, or protecting outdoor items, this spray paint has you covered.

LONG-LASTING & RESISTANT: Our primer is specially formulated to resist the elements and everyday wear and tear, providing long-lasting protection for your projects. Enjoy the beauty of a freshly painted surface for years to come.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality can of Grey Primer Spray Paint contains 250ml of paint that is ideal as a base coat preparation before a final topcoat. Safety Warning No warning applicable
